message:
feat(fcp-bootstrap): session-selection state machine with timeout support br-24llg.4.2.1

Add SessionSelectionOutcome type and select_and_authenticate() entry point
that combines token ranking, selection, and PKCS#11 authentication into a
single deterministic flow. Add session timeout tracking (default 5min) with
is_expired(), check_alive(), and SessionExpired error variant. Export
SessionSelectionOutcome from crate root. Refactor workflow to use the new
entry point. Add 14 new tests covering timeout behavior, state machine
transitions, and error paths. All 580+ tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
